PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "public\\assets\\images\\bracelets" -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName, Length | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Path = $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + "\\", ""\); SizeKB = [math]::Round\($_.Length / 1KB, 1\) } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{p=0} /^<svg/{print "<svg xmlns=\\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\\" viewBox=\\"0 0 666.66669 666.66669\\">"; print "  <style>"; print "    .owl-stroke {"; print "      fill: none;"; print "      stroke: #b79250;"; print "      stroke-width: 3;"; print "      stroke-linecap: round;"; print "      stroke-linejoin: round;"; print "      stroke-dasharray: 1 1;"; print "      stroke-dashoffset: 1;"; print "      animation: owlDraw 2.6s ease-out 0.2s forwards, owlBreath 3.4s ease-in-out 3s infinite;"; print "    }"; print "    @keyframes owlDraw { to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; } }"; print "    @keyframes owlBreath { 0%,100% { stroke-width: 3; } 50% { stroke-width: 3.6; } }"; print "  </style>"; p=1; next} /<g/{if\(p==1\){p=2}} p>=2{print} /<\\/svg>/{exit}' 6713428.svg)
Bash(awk '/<path/{p=NR} /class="owl-stroke"$/{if\(p>0\)print "MISSING pathLength near line " p}' public/assets/logo/owl.svg)
